overview: Dr. Arman Kabir's Care is a comprehensive bilingual (English/Bangla) Patient Management and Doctor Portal for clinics and individual practitioners. It supports full outpatient and inpatient clinical workflows with role-based access for Consultants, Medical Officers, Intern Doctors, Nurses, Staff, Patients, and Admins. The app is PWA-installable and works offline with automatic cloud sync across all devices.
features: Role-based dashboards for Consultant, MO, Intern, Nurse, Staff, and Admin
Full outpatient and inpatient (admitted) patient management
Visit form with systemic examination and SOAP daily progress notes
Prescription & EMR with clinical intelligence alerts (drug interactions, allergy, renal dose, sepsis, AKI)
Bilingual (English/Bangla) UI with Bengali advice templates
Handover system with auto-detected shifts, Consultant comments, and audible alarm notifications
Investigation tracking with AI interpretation, 2-stage status, and per-test trend graphs
Money receipts for appointments and procedures (printable PDF)
Doctor Serial Display with split-screen health education video
Hybrid storage: offline-first (IndexedDB) with real-time cloud sync across all devices
Patient portal: complaints, vitals submission, drug reminders, chat with doctor
Public landing page with appointment booking and emergency WhatsApp consultation
Full audit trail visible to Admin and Consultant Doctor
PWA installable on Android and iPad
